name: design-trends-2026
description: Apply 2026's top graphic design trends to any creative brief. Based on Kittl × Savee's 2026 Design Trends Report (10 trends + 2 honorable mentions), backed by Adobe, Figma, and Pinterest data. Use when: **Designing a brand identity** — pick the right aesthetic for your audience; **Creating social media assets** — use trending visual languages that perform; **Briefing a designer or AI image tool** — give precise style direction with vocabulary and references; **Refreshing a visual identity** — kn
author: guia-matthieu
